task_updates.executor_notes: Added `resolve_payment_route()`, `_get_payment_route_row()`, and `resolve_payment_destinations()` in `server_config.py`, using the same exact-channel -> parent -> guild-default hierarchy as social routing and returning persisted `route_key` plus resolved confirm/notify destinations. Verified with `python -m compileall src/common/server_config.py` and the full `PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/test_social_publications.py -q` module, which now includes a payment-route resolution case.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. Payment-route resolution now mirrors the social hierarchy exactly: exact channel, then parent, then guild default. `resolve_payment_destinations()` returns the resolved `route_key` plus `confirm_channel_id`, `confirm_thread_id`, `notify_channel_id`, and `notify_thread_id`, and only returns `None` when no payment route exists at all.
